dataSourceInstructions: Semantic model for bike-share fleet analytics. Use DAX measures for pre-calculated KPIs. Utilization measures are already × 100 (display as %). Use measures like [SLA Compliance %], [Critical Rate %], [Avg Weather Impact Factor] for quick answers.
userDescription: Direct Lake semantic model over the bicycles_gold lakehouse. Contains 10 tables with 48 DAX measures for fleet utilization, demand analysis, rebalancing cost, weather impact, and ML forecasts.

elements.description: Station master data: location, capacity, current status, utilization, and rebalance priority.
Neighbourhood-level aggregates: station count, capacity, health score, density tier.
Hour-of-day reference: time periods, rush hour flags, demand tiers.
Calendar date reference: year, quarter, month, week, day, weekend flag, season.
Hourly weather observations with cycling comfort index and severity.

children.description: Hours with severe or bad weather

elements.description: Station availability events. Largest table (~561M rows). Always filter by date range.
Hourly demand aggregated by neighbourhood. Key for demand analysis and trending.
Rebalancing assessments: priority, recommended action, cost estimate per station.
Weather impact on bike demand: adjusted demand, multiplier, comfort, suppression/boost.
ML demand forecasts with confidence intervals and pre-positioning recommendations.
